title: xanthophyllum ancolanum
intro: Xanthophyllum ancolanum, also known as the Ancol tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum ancolanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for use in traditional medicine, as well as being used in the production of traditional remedies such as tonics and salves.
